use_cases: Quick file search with autocomplete dropdown for productivity tools
Command palette for executing actions like deployments or checks
Unified search interface combining files and actions in one place
ai_summary: An animated command palette search component featuring a collapsible dropdown menu with staggered GSAP animations. Supports searching files and executing quick actions like deployments or lint checks. Includes keyboard navigation support with focus-triggered expansion and Lucide icons for visual clarity.
